ksa_text: Assess and monitor third-party AI risks, including vendor evaluation, pre-trained model provenance review, dependency tracking, contract management for AI components, and contingency planning for service disruption.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: task maps directly to AI System Owner scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("evaluat.{0,15} ?:ai|model|risk|bias"). STRM composite is zero (0.0000 — note: STRM frameworks underweight pure risk vocabulary); note that framework scores routinely underweight risk management and governance vocabulary, so text-based signal carries primary weight here. Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External check: no matches in RSK job postings or cert curricula (CRISC, FRM, NIST AI RMF, CISM). Would a working AI System Owner self-report this as required?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Challenge answered: the competency is implicit in AI System Owner work (domain affinity 0.88, 1 RSK signal(s)). Framework vocabulary matching systematically underrepresents risk management and governance KSAs.
